title: hibiscus irritans
intro: Hibiscus irritans, also known as the crab claw or crab's claw hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, characterized by its distinctive red and green flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of hibiscus irritans include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Hibiscus irritans can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
